get.description: Get your account details

allOf.description:
User resource representing the account details of the authenticated user.
For internal reasons, HCP Terraform associates team and organization tokens
with a synthetic user account called service user.

patch.description: Update your username and email address. Other attributes are ignored.
Change your account password

current_password.description: The user's current password. Unlike most API data attributes, this one uses underscore_case instead of kebab-case.

password_confirmation.description: The confirmation of the user's new password. Unlike most API data attributes, this one uses underscore_case instead of kebab-case.

get.description: Lists the previous invoices for an organization. This endpoint uses cursor-based pagination with a fixed page size of 10 items. Pass the value of meta.continuation as the cursor parameter to retrieve the next page. When meta.continuation is null there are no further pages.

parameters.name: organization_name
parameters.description: The name of the organization.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The ID of the invoice where the page should start. If omitted, the endpoint returns the first page.

continuation.description: The cursor value to use for the next page request. Null when there are no more items.

get.description: Returns the upcoming invoice for the next billing period for an organization. Returns null when no upcoming invoice is available.

state-versions.description: Permission level for workspace state versions.

sentinel-mocks.description: Permission level for workspace Sentinel mocks.

run-tasks.description: Whether the team can manage run tasks within the project's workspaces.

policy-overrides.description: Whether the team can override policy checks within the project's workspaces. This field is available only when the `TEAM_OVERRIDE_POLICY_CHECKS` feature flag is enabled.

access.description: The type of access the team has on the workspace. Valid values are read, plan, write, admin, or custom.

runs.description: The permission for the workspace's runs. Can only be used when access is custom.

variables.description: The permission for the workspace's variables. Can only be used when access is custom.

state-versions.description: The permission for the workspace's state versions. Can only be used when access is custom.

sentinel-mocks.description: The permission for the workspace's Sentinel mocks. Can only be used when access is custom.

workspace-locking.description: Whether the team can manually lock or unlock the workspace. Can only be used when access is custom.

run-tasks.description: Whether the team can manage run tasks within the workspace. Can only be used when access is custom.

policy-overrides.description: Whether the team can override policy checks for the workspace. This field is available only when the `TEAM_OVERRIDE_POLICY_CHECKS` feature flag is enabled.

id.description: The external ID of the integration.

provider.description: The provider identifier for the integration.

description.description: A description of what the integration does.

homepage.description: The homepage URL for the integration.

stages.description: The run stages where this integration can be used.

params.description: Ordered list of configuration parameters required by the integration.

sensitive.description: Whether the parameter contains sensitive data.

description.example: Provide the API URL from Cloudability

placeholder.description: Optional placeholder shown in the input field.

helpLinkText.description: Optional helper link text shown alongside the parameter.

id.description: An identifier for the repository check (typically the repository identifier)

exists.description: Whether the repository exists and is accessible

identifier.description: The repository identifier that was checked

id.description: A unique identifier for this validation result

module-name.description: The module name that was validated

provider-name.description: The provider name that was validated

valid.description: Whether the module name and provider combination is available

id.description: The ID of the SSH key.

name.description: The name of the SSH key.

value.description: The private key value. This is write-only and will not be returned in the response.

self.description: The path to the SSH key.

ssh-key.description: The SSH private key. Write-only; use has-ssh-key to check if a key has been set.

stage.description: Deprecated. Use `stages` instead. The stage in the run lifecycle when the run task should begin.
The run stage during which this task stage executes (e.g., post_plan, pre_plan, pre_apply, post_apply).

status-timestamps.description: A map of status names to timestamps indicating when the task stage entered each status. Keys are formatted as "{status}-at".

message.description: A message describing the result of the run task execution.

status-timestamps.description: A map of status names to timestamps indicating when the task result entered each status. Keys are formatted as "{status}-at".

url.description: A URL the run task integration provided with details about the task execution.

task-id.description: The external ID of the run task.

task-name.description: The name of the run task.

task-url.description: The URL of the run task definition.

task-result-outcomes-count.description: The number of task result outcomes associated with this task result.

stage.description: The run stage during which this task result was created.

is-speculative.description: Whether the associated run is speculative (plan-only).

workspace-task-id.description: The external ID of the workspace task configuration.

workspace-task-enforcement-level.description: The enforcement level of the workspace task (e.g., advisory, mandatory).

agent-pool-id.description: The external ID of the agent pool, when private run tasks are enabled.

outcome-id.description: A unique identifier for this outcome within the run task result.

description.description: A human-readable description of this outcome.

tags.description: An array of tag category objects. Each object has a label (category name) and a value array of tag entries with label and level fields.

url.description: A URL with additional details about this outcome.

body.description: URL to download the outcome body. Only present when the run task integration uploaded a body for this outcome.

cleanup-on-failure.description: Auto-delete partial destination workspace on failure

history-cutoff.description: Copy runs and state versions after this date. Null copies all history.

workspace-prefix.description: Prepended to workspace name in destination

workspace-suffix.description: Appended to workspace name in destination

page_size.name: page[size]
page_size.description: The number of items to retrieve per page. Defaults to 20.
